faction.name: CyberAcme
faction.description: CyberAcme is your gateway to the Marathon experience. Complete contracts to gain reputation and unlock powerful upgrades for your Runner shell.
faction.reputationDescription:
• Any teammate completing CyberAcme contracts
• Successfully Exfiltrating
• Engaging with Intercept Events

contracts.name: Introducing: Arachne
contracts.description: In any zone, deal damage to opposing Runners and successfully down a hostile Runner.

contracts.name: Introducing: Mida
contracts.description: Across Tau Ceti IV, defeat UESC combat units and smash glass in buildings.

contracts.name: Introducing: Traxus
contracts.description: In Dire Marsh, hack a UESC terminal in Intersection, Bio-Research, or Complex. Defeat the responding Commander and take their shipping manifest, then scan the indicated container before it's transported.
